title: Lifelike
description: Cellular Automata simulators! For ModFest: Toybox
body:
[![Made for ModFest: Toybox](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ModFest/art/refs/heads/v2/badge/svg/toybox/cozy.svg)](https://modfest.net/toybox)

Adds a block that allows you to simulate cellular automata (e.g. Conway's Game of Life, Rule 110, etc) in a set area when pulsed with redstone.

The rules (and blocks) that the simulator uses are (mostly) fully configurable.
